## Summary

Describe the problem and the implementation approach in 3-5 bullets.

## What changed

- [ ] UI changes
- [ ] API changes
- [ ] Domain/state changes
- [ ] Infra/LAN changes
- [ ] Documentation updates

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] Manual QA completed

## Screenshot checklist

Attach screenshots or GIFs when UI behavior changes.

- [ ] Desktop - Dashboard (`docs/media/dashboard-desktop.png`)
- [ ] Mobile - Devices (`docs/media/devices-mobile.png`)
- [ ] Interaction demo (`docs/media/brightness-control.gif`)
- [ ] Empty/loading/error states (when applicable)
- [ ] Before/after evidence for visual regressions (when applicable)

## Notes for reviewers

List any risks, migration notes, or follow-up items.
